primarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
primarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
sources.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: Bologna Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

decklistSource.label: Ahri official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

secondaryDeckSources.label: Ahri Riftbound.gg best-of deck
secondaryDeckSources.description: Trusted Riftbound.gg Best of Legend deck reference preserved as a secondary source.

resolvedCard.name: Blitzcrank - Impassive
resolvedCard.effect:
[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
When you play me to a battlefield, you may move an enemy unit to here.
When I hold, return me to my owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Clockwork Keeper
resolvedCard.effect:
You may pay :rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Disarming Rake
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may kill a gear.

resolvedCard.name: Eager Apprentice
resolvedCard.effect: While I'm at a battlefield, the Energy costs for spells you play is reduced by :rb_energy_1:, to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:.

resolvedCard.name: Ravenbloom Student
resolvedCard.effect: When you play a spell, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Sona - Harmonious
resolvedCard.effect: At the end of your turn, if I'm at a battlefield, ready up to 4 friendly runes.

resolvedCard.name: Thousand-Tailed Watcher
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Block
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit [Shield 3] and [Tank] this turn. (+3 :rb_might: while it's a defender. It must be assigned combat damage first.)

resolvedCard.name: Consult the Past
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

resolvedCard.name: Defy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

resolvedCard.name: Desert's Call
resolvedCard.effect:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token.

resolvedCard.name: Discipline
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Feral Strength
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Meditation
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
As an additional cost to play this, you may exhaust a friendly unit. If you do, draw 2. Otherwise, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Not So Fast
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

resolvedCard.name: Singularity
resolvedCard.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

resolvedCard.name: Thwonk!
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Stun an attacking unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

resolvedCard.name: Unchecked Power
resolvedCard.effect: Exhaust all friendly units, then deal 12 to ALL units at battlefields.

resolvedCard.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
If a friendly unit would die, kill this instead. Heal that unit, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

resolvedCard.name: Grove of the God-Willow
resolvedCard.effect: When you hold here, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Ravenbloom Conservatory
resolvedCard.effect: When you defend here, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, put it in your hand. Otherwise, recycle it.

resolvedCard.name: The Dreaming Tree
resolvedCard.effect: When a player chooses a friendly unit here with a spell for the first time each turn, they draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Ahri - Alluring
resolvedCard.effect: When I hold, you score 1 point.

resolvedCard.name: Consult the Past
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

resolvedCard.name: Disarming Rake
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may kill a gear.

resolvedCard.name: Janna - Savior
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
When you play me, heal your units here, then move up to one enemy unit from here to its base.

resolvedCard.name: Thousand-Tailed Watcher
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Wind Wall
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell.
